title: Project Hail Mary
author: Andy Weir
pullQuote: "I don't know how Andy Weir got me, an arachnophobe, to cry over a giant spider. But here we are."
review: Stayed up all night for this one. Andy Weir somehow got me — a certified arachnophobe — to say 'aww' at a goodbye scene with a giant spider the size of a dog. I had no idea there was going to be an alien. Blew my mind. The physics was refreshing, Stratt was the most compelling authoritarian girlboss until she wasn't, and Rocky is the best fictional friendship I've read in years. The fact that he voluntarily chose to live on their planet for the rest of his life? Could not be me. But I respect it.
